entities.name: PEARL MILLET

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew disease

entities.description: A disease caused by Sclerospora graminicola in pearl millet

entities.name: GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of oospores sprouting and becoming active

entities.description: The process of suspending oospores in NaOCl to prepare them for germination

entities.name: TEMPERATURE

entities.description: The density of oospores in water, which influences the germination rate
